mapper.insert:
SELECT EXAM.SEQ_SYS_RIGHT.nextval from dual
INSERT INTO SYS_RIGHT( ID, NAME, PARENT_ID, STATUS, URL, CODE, SEQ, MEMO, ENABLED_FLAG )VALUES( #id:NUMERIC#, #name:VARCHAR#, #parentId:NUMERIC#, #status:VARCHAR#, #url:VARCHAR#, #code:VARCHAR#, #seq:NUMERIC#, #memo:VARCHAR#, #enabledFlag:NUMERIC# )
mapper.update: UPDATE SYS_RIGHT SET ID=#id:NUMERIC#, NAME=#name:VARCHAR#, PARENT_ID=#parentId:NUMERIC#, STATUS=#status:VARCHAR#, URL=#url:VARCHAR#, CODE=#code:VARCHAR#, SEQ=#seq:NUMERIC#, MEMO=#memo:VARCHAR#, ENABLED_FLAG=#enabledFlag:NUMERIC# WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE SYS_RIGHT SET ENABLED_FLAG=0 WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT R.* FROM SYS_ROLE_RIGHT_REL RE,SYS_RIGHT R WHERE RE.ROLE_ID=#{id} AND RE.RIGHT_ID=R.ID
